package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_caching_json_cache_value_stored_as_string: Layer: Caching. Flag caches that store JSON strings only to unmarshal them again before every use.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule511NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario511Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule511NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
